meaning: adj.感到自信和自满的,洋洋得意的
examples: Maybe not so jaunty, after all.
His own signature: a jaunty white hat.
One large room is hung with jaunty linoleum prints.
"True Love On Three With Feeling" is actually a jaunty duet, backed by trumpet and a peppy chorus.
And Sir Paul McCartney wrapped up proceedings with a jaunty crowd participation version of Ob-La-Di, Ob-La-Da.
